tasks.subject: Task 0: Pin boto3 to >=1.34,<2.0 in pixi.toml
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace `boto3 = "*"` with `boto3 = ">=1.34,<2.0"` so the SigV4 strategy in Task 4 builds against a tested SDK version range.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pixi.toml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- boto3 pinned to >=1.34,<2.0
- pixi install resolves clean
- full test suite green

**Verify:** `pixi install && pixi run test 2>&1 | tail -5`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pixi.toml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi install --dry-run && pixi run test 2>&1 | tail -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["boto3 pinned to >=1.34,<2.0", "pixi install resolves clean", "full test suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: AuthStrategy ABC + typed boundary objects
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `core/auth.py` with `HealthResult` + `HttpRequest` frozen dataclasses + `AuthStrategy` ABC (5 abstractmethods).

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/auth.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_auth.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- HealthResult frozen dataclass with 3 fields
- HttpRequest frozen dataclass with 4 fields
- AuthStrategy ABC with 5 abstractmethods (credentials_present, health_check, redact_patterns, apply, client_kwargs)
- ABC cannot be instantiated
- Partial subclasses still abstract

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_auth.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10` → 5 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/auth.py", "tests/core/test_auth.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_auth.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HealthResult frozen dataclass with 3 fields", "HttpRequest frozen dataclass with 4 fields", "AuthStrategy ABC with 5 abstractmethods", "ABC cannot be instantiated", "Partial subclasses still abstract"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Bearer strategy + 8 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bearer-token strategy from named env var. Used by HostedAPIEngine today + future Replicate/Runway/Luma.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/auth.py`
- Modify: `tests/core/test_auth.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Bearer constructs from env_var
- credentials_present reflects env state
- health_check uses injected http_get seam
- redact_patterns escapes actual secret value (NOT env var name)
- apply adds Authorization header immutably
- apply respects scheme + header_name overrides
- client_kwargs returns api_key shape

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_auth.py -v -k bearer 2>&1 | tail -10` → 8 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/auth.py", "tests/core/test_auth.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_auth.py -v -k bearer 2>&1 | tail -10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Bearer constructs from env_var", "credentials_present reflects env state", "health_check uses injected http_get seam", "redact_patterns escapes actual secret value", "apply adds Authorization header immutably", "apply respects scheme + header_name overrides", "client_kwargs returns api_key shape"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: GCPServiceAccount strategy + 7 unit tests (lazy google.auth)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Concrete strategy minting GCP access tokens via google.auth default chain. Lazy-imported.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/auth.py`
- Modify: `tests/core/test_auth.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GCPServiceAccount constructs with default scopes
- credentials_present checks GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS file existence
- health_check uses google.auth.default via lazy import
- redact_patterns matches ya29.<base64> token shape
- apply adds Bearer header with refreshed token
- client_kwargs returns {credentials: ...}
- google.auth never imported at module top

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_auth.py -v -k gcp 2>&1 | tail -15` → 7 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/auth.py", "tests/core/test_auth.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_auth.py -v -k gcp 2>&1 | tail -15", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GCPServiceAccount constructs with default scopes", "credentials_present checks GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS file existence", "health_check uses google.auth.default via lazy import", "redact_patterns matches ya29 token shape", "apply adds Bearer header with refreshed token", "client_kwargs returns credentials dict", "google.auth never imported at module top"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: AWSSigV4 strategy + 7 unit tests (lazy boto3)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SigV4 signing via boto3 session credentials chain. SDK lazy-imported. Signing via stdlib hashlib+hmac (not botocore.auth) to keep seam SDK-version-independent.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/auth.py`
- Modify: `tests/core/test_auth.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- AWSSigV4 constructs with required region_name
- credentials_present reflects boto3 session creds chain
- health_check via sts.get_caller_identity
- redact_patterns covers AKIA/ASIA + SigV4 Authorization + session token
- apply signs via stdlib hashlib+hmac
- client_kwargs returns full AWS credential shape
- boto3 never imported at module top

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_auth.py -v -k sigv4 2>&1 | tail -15` → 7 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/auth.py", "tests/core/test_auth.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_auth.py -v -k sigv4 2>&1 | tail -15", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AWSSigV4 constructs with required region_name", "credentials_present reflects boto3 session creds chain", "health_check via sts.get_caller_identity", "redact_patterns covers AKIA/ASIA + SigV4 Authorization + session token", "apply signs via stdlib hashlib+hmac", "client_kwargs returns full AWS credential shape", "boto3 never imported at module top"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: build_auth_strategy registry + 6 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Map YAML auth: block to concrete AuthStrategy via build_auth_strategy(spec).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/auth.py`
- Modify: `tests/core/test_auth.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- registry builds Bearer/GCPSA/SigV4 by name
- unknown name raises UnknownAdapter
- missing strategy key raises KeyError with helpful message
- strategy-specific kwargs pass through
- full test_auth.py count = 33 passed

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_auth.py -v 2>&1 | tail -20` → 33 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/auth.py", "tests/core/test_auth.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_auth.py -v 2>&1 | tail -20", "acceptanceCriteria": ["registry builds Bearer/GCPSA/SigV4 by name", "unknown name raises UnknownAdapter", "missing strategy key raises KeyError", "strategy-specific kwargs pass through", "full test_auth.py = 33 passed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: ABC stable-surface invariant + extended subprocess-isolation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock the 5 ABC method signatures via checked-in JSON baseline. Extend subprocess-isolation to scan for vendor-SDK leaks.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/fixtures/auth_strategy_baseline.json`
- Modify: `tests/test_core_invariant.py` (add 2 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- baseline JSON file exists with 5 keys
- stable-surface test diffs inspect.signature against baseline
- drift detection actually fails when signature perturbed
- SDK-leak test asserts no boto3/google.auth/botocore in sys.modules
- full invariant suite = 8 passed (6 pre-existing + 2 new)

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/test_core_invariant.py -v 2>&1 | tail -15` → 8 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/fixtures/auth_strategy_baseline.json", "tests/test_core_invariant.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_core_invariant.py -v 2>&1 | tail -15", "acceptanceCriteria": ["baseline JSON file exists with 5 keys", "stable-surface test diffs inspect.signature", "drift detection actually fails on perturbation", "SDK-leak test asserts no boto3/google.auth/botocore in sys.modules", "full invariant suite = 8 passed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: FakeAuthStrategy shared test fixture + 8 tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship FakeAuthStrategy — complete no-network AuthStrategy for engine and probe tests in Layers 2+3.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/_fixtures/__init__.py`
- Create: `tests/_fixtures/fake_auth.py`
- Create: `tests/_fixtures/test_fake_auth.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- FakeAuthStrategy subclasses AuthStrategy
- all 5 ABC methods implemented
- credentials_ok=False simulates auth failure cleanly
- redact_patterns matches configured fake token

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/_fixtures/test_fake_auth.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10` → 8 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/_fixtures/__init__.py", "tests/_fixtures/fake_auth.py", "tests/_fixtures/test_fake_auth.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/_fixtures/test_fake_auth.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FakeAuthStrategy subclasses AuthStrategy", "all 5 ABC methods implemented", "credentials_ok=False simulates auth failure", "redact_patterns matches configured fake token"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: HostedAPIEngine retrofit with backward-compat
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add optional auth_strategy kwarg. Default-derive Bearer from cfg.api_key_env. All 9 pre-Layer-1 construction sites stay green.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py`
- Modify: `tests/engines/test_hosted.py` (existing tests stay green + 2 new)

**Pre-implementation grep:** `rg -n "HostedAPIEngine\\(" src/ tests/ examples/ --type py` confirms 9 sites.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- auth_strategy=None default still works via Bearer derivation
- explicit auth_strategy=Bearer(...) stored at self._auth
- cfg.engine.hosted.auth block routes through build_auth_strategy
- provision() raises AuthError on credentials_present False
- all 9 pre-Layer-1 construction sites still pass
- zero cross-suite regressions

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v 2>&1 | tail -15` + `pixi run test 2>&1 | tail -10` → all green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_hosted.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v 2>&1 | tail -15", "acceptanceCriteria": ["auth_strategy=None default works via Bearer derivation", "explicit auth_strategy=Bearer(...) stored at self._auth", "cfg.engine.hosted.auth block routes through build_auth_strategy", "provision() raises AuthError on missing creds", "all 9 pre-Layer-1 construction sites still pass", "zero cross-suite regressions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: tools/probe_hosted.py preflight tool + 6 tests + pixi task
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Preflight tool walking every configured AuthStrategy + atomic snapshot. Used by Layer 2/3 live smokes as fail-fast gate.

**Files:**
- Create: `tools/probe_hosted.py`
- Create: `tests/test_probe_hosted.py`
- Modify: `pixi.toml` (add probe-hosted task)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ProbeResult dataclass with name/ok/identity/reason
- probe_strategies iterates and produces results in order
- write_snapshot is atomic (tmp+rename, no partial files)
- snapshot JSON includes git_sha + captured_at + strategies
- exit 0 only when every strategy passes
- pixi run probe-hosted task wired

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/test_probe_hosted.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10` → 6 passed; `pixi run probe-hosted -- --help` → argparse usage

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/probe_hosted.py", "tests/test_probe_hosted.py", "pixi.toml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_probe_hosted.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ProbeResult dataclass with name/ok/identity/reason", "probe_strategies iterates and produces results in order", "write_snapshot is atomic (tmp+rename)", "snapshot JSON includes git_sha + captured_at + strategies", "exit 0 only when every strategy passes", "pixi run probe-hosted task wired"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: README auth strategies section + PROGRESS Phase 41 + final gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire Layer 1 into docs and recovery index. Run full suite + lint + typecheck + pre-commit as the closing gate. Backfill per-task SHAs.

**Files:**

- Modify: `PROGRESS.md` (Phase 41 entry with per-task SHAs)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- README has Auth strategies subsection documenting 3 strategies + auth: YAML + backward-compat + probe-hosted + how to add new strategy
- PROGRESS has Phase 41 entry with 11 per-task SHAs filled in
- full test suite green
- lint clean
- typecheck clean
- pre-commit clean

**Verify:** `pixi run test && pixi run lint && pixi run typecheck && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files 2>&1 | tail -20` → all green
